title: Pan-Seared Fish with Stamppot
description: A simple and flavorful Dutch-inspired dish featuring pan-seared fish and a hearty stamppot side.

ingredients.name: Fish fillets
ingredients.notes: Choose a firm white fish like cod or haddock

ingredients.name: Dutch stamppot mix
ingredients.notes: Look for a mix with kale, potatoes, and sausage

ingredients.name: Butter
ingredients.notes: Salted or unsalted, whichever you prefer

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use flaky sea salt for added flavor

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince or press for added flavor

instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the fish fillets with salt and black pepper.
Add 1 tablespoon of butter to the skillet and let it melt.
Sear the fish for 3-4 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
While the fish cooks, prepare the stamppot according to the package instructions.
Remove the fish from the skillet and let it rest for 2-3 minutes.
Serve the fish with the stamppot and garnish with minced garlic, if desired.
Enjoy your delicious and easy Pan-Seared Fish with Stamppot!
